<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell (`.`), which is safe to step on. The goal `O` is located two cells north and two cells east. A viable path is to move forward twice north, then turn clockwise to face east, then move east twice. The first step is safe, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is a floor cell (`.`), which is safe to step on. The goal `O` is visible two cells east and one cell north of the current position. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal. There are no obstacles ahead, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. The goal `O` is two cells to the east, with a floor cell in between. I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing east. The cell directly ahead (east) is a floor cell (`.`), which is safe. The goal `O` is two cells ahead in the same direction. Moving forward will bring us one step closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing east. The cell directly ahead is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. The goal O is directly north of the agent. To face north, I need to turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal O is to my east, one step away. I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
